ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the team */,
  "player_dob" TEXT /* Player's date of birth */,
  "player_height" REAL /* Player's height in meters */,
  "player_weight" REAL /* Player's weight in kilograms */,
  "player_nationality" TEXT /* Player's nationality */,
  "player_jersey_number" INTEGER /* Player's jersey number */,
  "player_foot" TEXT /* Player's preferred foot (left or right) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League in which the team competes */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's coach */,
  "team_foundation_date" TEXT /* Date when the team was founded */,
  "team_home_city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "team_home_country" TEXT /* Country where the team is based */,
  "team_stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's home stadium */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* Team's official website */,
  "team_social_media" TEXT /* Team's social media handles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored */,
  "shots" INTEGER /* Number of shots taken */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Shooting accuracy percentage */,
  "scoring" REAL /* Scoring percentage */,
  "passing_accuracy" REAL /* Passing accuracy percentage */,
  "tackles" INTEGER /* Number of successful tackles */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions */,
  "fouls_committed" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed */,
  "fouls_suffered" INTEGER /* Number of fouls suffered */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played in the game */,
  "distance_covered" REAL /* Total distance covered in kilometers */,
  "sprints" INTEGER /* Number of sprints performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date when the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the game was played */,
  "game_referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "game_attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "game_conditions" TEXT /* Weather and field conditions */,
  "game_result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., 'Home Win', 'Away Win', 'Draw') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
column_names: ID of the team the player belongs to
Position of the player on the team
League in which the team competes
Date when the team was founded
City where the team is based
Country where the team is based
Capacity of the team's home stadium
Unique identifier for each performance metric entry
Total minutes played in the game
Date when the game was played
Venue where the game was played
Result of the game (e.g., 'Home Win', 'Away Win', 'Draw')
